prompt: Coordinate two agents to process tasks sequentially without relying on blocking database locks.
agent_thoughts: Using PubSub. Agent 2 subscribes to 'system_events'. Agent 1 publishes 'PATCH_COMPLETE' when done.
plan: Agent 2 idles on Queue. Agent 1 executes, puts event in Queue. Agent 2 wakes up and processes.
patch: Task pipeline sequenced correctly through event triggers instead of mechanical state locks.
reason: Agent 2 successfully triggered its validation sequence solely off Agent 1's PubSub broadcast.
